title: ASR Outdoor Carabiner and Awning Clamp Set Camping Essentials Tarp Clips 4pc Set
description:
The ASR Outdoor 4pc clamp and carabiner set prove to be a camping essential – the durable plastic clamps are great for tying down awnings and camping tarps, and the carabiners provide a convenient clip so you can hang the clamps when not in use. The tarp clamps are constructed of high-quality ABS plastic that is designed to be tough and weatherproof so you can use them with confidence, rain or shine. The carabiners are made of aluminum that won’t rust (they are NOT for climbing). In addition to tying down camping tarps, the clamps are great for awnings, fabric, party tents, and pipe frames. The carabiners will come in handy for other uses like carrying grocery bags and keeping items organized and easy to reach on your backpack, in your car, RV, or boat

The carabiners will come in handy for other uses like carrying grocery bags and keeping items organized and easy to reach on your backpack, in your car, RV or boat.
  • CONVENIENT KEY CHAINS – Each of the included carabiners comes with a convenient key ring for easy attachment to your keys, lanyards and other necessities. Carabiners are great accessories to keep around your house, office or bug out bag.
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Material: ABS plastic (tarp clamps), aluminum (carabiners); 4 piece set; Colors: Assorted; Dimensions: 2.75”/7mm length (carabiners), 3.25” x 1” (clamps); Carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING
